title: Visual Communication Design Program Learning Outcomes
content:
Visual Communication Design Program Learning Outcomes

Knows the basic theoretical knowledge, principles and concepts of visual communication design.

Knows the aesthetic rules of design and has aesthetic awareness.

Compares and solves complex design problems of cultures and nations

Knows and has the ability to apply national and international ethical rules, legislation and quality standards in the field of visual communication

Knows multimedia techniques used in visual communication design.

Expresses methods and techniques related to Visual Communication Design with field-specific computer programs.

Generates creative and innovative ideas and transforms these ideas into graphic, photographic, typographic, illustrative 2 and 3D, animated and interactive visual expressions.

Applies the tools and techniques required for visual communication design in the New Media environment

Have the skills and competency to create a portfolio in the field of visual communication design

Examines research and development projects with a critical approach in order to find solutions to the problems in the field of visual communication design from different perspectives.

Examines research and development projects with a critical approach in order to find solutions to the problems in the field of visual communication design from different perspectives.

Explains knowledge in the field and communicates with colleagues using a foreign language (European Language Portfolio General Level: B1 Level).

Relates scientific, social, economic, legal and political developments with theoretical knowledge, principles and concepts of visual communication design

Has the competence of problem solving, planning, project management and presentation in the design project development process.

Abstract and concrete concepts; have the ability to act entrepreneurial and innovative by designing with creative thinking.

Have the ability to organize and use aesthetic information in the fields of social sciences and related art disciplines and visual communication design.

Summarizes the values of professional and ethical responsibility.

Have sensitivity about the effects and legal consequences of professional studies in the field in the universal and social dimensions.

Summarizes the information related to the field of occupational health and safety.
